creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Automation User from comment #1)

Hi,

Thanks for the feedback.

I think it would be reasonable to ut this port under the xfce@ umbrella.

Would you approve passing maintainership to xfce@FreeBSD.org?


In the while I'll test the port and commit the update, changing the maintainer to xfce if you approve.
